data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declares $0.34 per share dividend for Q3 2025, to be paid on Oct. 24.
data.description: Atlanta-based Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. disclosed today that its Board of Directors sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.34 for each common stock share for Q3 2025. Shareholders can anticipate receiving this dividend on October 24, 2025.

data.title: DuPont sets record date of Oct 22, 2025 for Qnity spin-off from Electronics business.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, on September 24, 2025, DuPont (NYSE: DD) revealed that the board of directors has set October 22, 2025, as the record date for the distribution related to the planned spin-off of DuPont's Electronics business, Qnity.

data.title: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) reports strong Q3 2025 results, meeting financial guidance ranges, showing progress in reducing build times and costs.
data.description: In Los Angeles, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) announced its financial results for the third quarter ending on August 31, 2025. The company reported meeting or surpassing its projected ranges in essential business metrics, showing strong performance. Jeffrey Mezger, the Chairman and CEO, highlighted the successful execution and operational improvements that led to decreased build times and costs. The company's sales strategy in the quarter also contributed to their positive outcomes.

data.title: Christian author Daniel Boyer encourages believers to rise in God's authority amid spiritual warfare. - PRNewswire, Sept. 24, 2025
data.description: Daniel Boyer, in his recent book, emphasizes the importance of engaging in spiritual warfare and embracing repentance, while also advocating for walking in the power of the Holy Spirit. Discussing the prevalent belief that conflict permeates all aspects of society, Boyer highlights its presence in politics, nations, households, and religious institutions. He suggests that individuals need to actively participate in spiritual battles, with repentance and reliance on the Holy Spirit serving as essential components. Boyer's message of cultivating spiritual strength and awareness resonates strongly in the current environment.

data.title: Pickleman's partners with Brave Like McKenna Foundation in KC to raise awareness for pediatric cancer in September.
data.description: In September 2025, Pickleman's Gourmet Café in the Kansas City metropolitan area announced a collaboration with the Brave Like McKenna Foundation to support children and families fighting pediatric cancer. The foundation was created in honor of McKenna Royer, who passed away at the age of 11 due to Diffuse...

data.title: Dollar Tree to rebuild Marietta distribution center, 1 million sq. ft., after prior facility destroyed by tornado in April 2024.
data.description: In Chesapeake, Virginia, Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) commemorated the commencement of construction for a new one million square foot distribution center in Marietta, Oklahoma. This event signifies a crucial advancement for Dollar Tree as they reestablish operations in the area after their previous facility was destroyed by a tornado in April 2024. State and local officials, such as Governor Kevin Stitt and Senator James Lankford, joined Dollar Tree in this groundbreaking ceremony.

data.title: Cadence collaborates with TSMC to advance chip design & IP for AI, HPC; focusing on TSMC nodes & 3DFabric tech.
data.description: A significant development in chip design and IP has been revealed by Cadence in San Jose, California. This progress has been propelled by the enduring partnership with TSMC and is aimed at serving customers in the AI and HPC sectors. The announcement signifies important strides in enhancing technology solutions for these industries.

data.title: Owlet, Inc. (NYSE: OWLT) proposes settlement in derivative actions, related to all actions in United States District Court for Central District of California, case No. 2:24-cv-07258-FLA-PVC.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Owlet, Inc. (NYSE: OWLT) has announced a notice regarding the ongoing case in the United States District Court for the Central District of California titled: IN RE OWLET, INC. SHAREHOLDER DERIVATIVE LITIGATION Lead Case No. 2:24-cv-07258-FLA-PVC. This notice pertains to all actions. The notice is regarding the proposed derivative settlement in stockholder matters. All current record holders and beneficial owners of common stock are being informed about the hearing on this proposed settlement.

data.title: Flowcore Water expands with new location in Justin, Texas, marking its third branch after a successful launch four months prior.
data.description: A new branch of Flowcore Water, a prominent water well company based in Texas, has recently opened in Justin, Texas. This expansion signifies the company's third location and comes shortly after the accomplishment of launching a new branch only four months ago.

data.title: FactBlock joins as a founding partner of ORBT DAO Foundation, overseeing governance. Korea's leading blockchain ecosystem builder.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea on September 24, 2025, FactBlock, a prominent blockchain ecosystem developer in Korea and the host of Korea Blockchain Week (KBW), revealed its participation as a founding partner of the ORBT DAO Foundation. The Foundation will manage the governance structure...

data.title: Mission Rock Residential to manage Legends 267 in Kansas City; awarded management services contract.
data.description: Mission Rock Residential, a renowned property management company, has secured a management contract for Legends 267, an upscale high-rise apartment complex in Kansas City. The company, known for its expertise in property management, will oversee the operations of this modern residential community. This partnership marks a significant milestone for Mission Rock Residential as they continue to expand their portfolio. The management services contract awarded to them demonstrates trust in their capabilities.

data.title: First United Corp (NASDAQ: FUNC) declares dividend of $0.26 per share, payable on Nov 3, 2025, to holders of record.
data.description: In Oakland, Maryland, on September 24, 2025, First United Corporation (NASDAQ: FUNC) released a statement regarding a cash dividend of $.26 per share. The dividend is set to be distributed on November 3, 2025, to shareholders holding the Corporation's common stock as of the closing date.

data.title: Author Dr. Abraham DeAlmeida explores the link between Russia, Israel, and global conflict in his new book.
data.description: The latest geopolitical Christian book by author and pastor Dr. Abraham DeAlmeida, PhD, has linked Russia, Israel, and global conflict to biblical prophecy. Released on September 24, 2025, in Deerfield Beach, Florida, the book examines the connection between historical events, current happenings, scripture, and end-times theology. Dr. DeAlmeida's work delves into the intricate ties between these elements, offering readers a unique perspective on the subject matter.

data.title: Trophy Signature Homes opens Lowry Trails in Princeton, TX, expanding presence in fastest-growing city in the U.S. Model home now available for tours.
data.description: Trophy Signature Homes, a subsidiary of Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK), has launched Lowry Trails, a residential community in Princeton, Texas. This move bolsters Trophy Signature Homes' footprint in Princeton, acknowledged as the fastest-growing city in the U.S. The fully furnished model home is available for tours, offering potential buyers a glimpse into life in the community.
